title: Show
description: Conditionally renders children based on a reactive condition.
signature: Show<T>(props: { when: MaybeAccessor<T | undefined | null | false>; fallback?: MaybeAccessor<CReactNode>; children: CReactNode | ((item: Accessor<NonNullable<T>>) => CReactNode) }): JSXElement
prop_when_desc: Reactive condition. Children render when truthy. Accepts a value or an accessor.
prop_fallback_desc: Optional content to render when <0>when</0> is falsy.
prop_children_desc: Content to render, or a callback receiving the truthy value as an accessor.
